output.sparql:
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?team ?teamLabel ?wins WHERE {
  ?team p:P2748 ?winsStatement .
  ?winsStatement ps:P2748 ?wins .
  ?winsStatement pq:P1224 wd:Q28127991 .
  FILTER(datatype(?wins) = xsd:integer)
  OPTIONAL {
    ?team rdfs:label ?teamLabel .
    FILTER(lang(?teamLabel) = "en")
  }
}
ORDER BY DESC(?wins)
LIMIT 1
output.answer: According to the provided knowledge graph, no team with win data for the 2017 NFL season was found. However, in reality, the New England Patriots won the most games (13 wins) during the 2017 NFL Regular Season.
